etymology.description: Phonetic ећљ (earth layers, *Е‹eЛђw) + semantic е…Ђ (towering and bald) -> Depicts tall earth + kneeling man = legendary ruler
etymology.interpretation: The character е Ї (yГЎo) combines phonetic ећљ, which represents layers of earth and sounds like *Е‹eЛђw, with semantic е…Ђ, depicting a towering and bald figure. This combination suggests a legendary ruler who stands tall like the earth and exhibits a commanding presence. Such a ruler is perceived as lofty and powerful, akin to the towering formation of earth.
